title: Amazing Stories Of Blues And Soul
description: Ken Wood and the Mixers return to the fabulous Brunswick for one night only, with their fantastic four star Edinburgh Fringe show ‘Amazing Stories of Blues and Soul’. This lively, humorous show tells the story of Soul Music while a cracking eight piece band plays the songs of soul greats like James Brown, Otis Redding and Aretha Franklin. The show features the wild vocals and harmonica of the great Kenneth B Woode, ably supported by the great soul sounds of the might mighty Mixers. So put on your Hi Heel Sneakers, your sharpest suit or your poshest frock and get ready to dance the night away to some of the rockingest Blues, Soul and Ska sounds around. Amazing Stories of Blues and Soul, the most fun you can have with your clothes on!
